surface_verification.justification: Web surfaces touched are the SmartViewer markdown renderer (RTM deep-link navigation) and the Mission traceability read. The RTM deep-link resolution — the silent-failure risk CP-2 guards — is verified by a jsdom render+click component test (DocumentMarkdown CP-2) asserting #rtm-fr-0166 resolves to the sanitizer-prefixed user-content-rtm-fr-0166 anchor and calls scrollIntoView; full client suite (2860) green. No new server surface or contract shape; the manifest/RTM change is data regeneration (schema 2->3 key form), reader logic byte-identical (full server suite 2804 green).
